stemHtml: What is the main difference between OTS routes and T9, T13 and T16 routes?

options.a: NAT routes are north Atlantic tracks while T9, T13 and T16 routes are south pacific tracks.
options.b: The T9, T13 and T16 routes are fixed in position and allow traffic in easterly directions only.
options.c: NAT routes are outside of controlled airspace and T9, T13 and T16 routes are domestic routes.
options.d: NAT routes are in east-west directions while T9, T13 and T16 routes are in north-south directions.
